name: Addis Ababa (Ethiopia)
description: A white field charged centrally with the emblem of Addis Ababa.
history: Addis Ababa is one of two chartered cities of Ethiopia (alongside Dire Dawa) and is administered separately from the surrounding Oromia Region; it is also the seat of the federal government and of the African Union. The city emblem and flag were adopted under the post-1995 federal dispensation.

features.symbolism: the city seal showing local landmarks and inscriptions
